feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Q&A- Shipping point not determined using loading group, shipping condition and sLoc
entry.content:
I'm trying to determine the shipping point based on loading group, shipping condition and storage location.
What I have checked: 
Loading group is maintained in Material Master(MM02)
Shipping condtion is maintained in Customer Master
Question:
Is there any additional setting or configuration I might have missed?

entry.title: S/4 HANA How to Get rid of Basic Auth - SOAMANAGER Local Configuration on Client Certificate
entry.content:
This is part of 'S/4HANA How to Get rid of Basic Auth' Series. 

The local configuration in SOAMANAGER is also called automatic configuration. Rather than configured manully, the logical port is configured by the task automatically in the background.

However, in this mode, the authentication doesn't support OAuth2. To get rid of basic auth, an option is to use client certificate.

Configuration Steps

let's take sales order notification outbound as an example.

This is the office help document:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/19d48293097f4a2589433856b034dfa5/ed66f965148548a9bb76c24be640d7fc.html?locale=en-US

1. Generate certificate files and upload it into S4 HANA

Please refer to the configuration steps described here 

2. Activate the AIF

TCODE: /AIF/SETUP,  switch off 'test mode'

3. Unpack AIF Content

TCODE: /AIF/CONTENT_EXTRACT

4. Ensure that the Web service Point-to-Point is active in Customizing

5. Download WSDL file from SAP Accelerator Hub

https://help.sap.com/docs/link-disclaimer?site=https%3A%2F%2Fapi.sap.com%2Fapi%2FOP_CO_SDSLS_ESR_SALES_ORDER_NOTIF%2Foverview

6. Modify WSDL

Add namespace Prefix definitions

xmlns:wsp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/policy"
xmlns:sp="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/oasis-wss-wssecurity-policy-1.2"

Add a new policy before the wsdl:type section

    <wsp:Policy wsu:Id="ClientCertificateBindingPolicy">
        <wsp:ExactlyOne>
            <wsp:All>
                <!-- Mandate mutual authentication using X.509 Certificate -->
                <sp:TransportBinding xmlns:sp="http://docs.oasis-open.org/ws-sx/ws-securitypolicy/200702">
                    <wsp:Policy>
                        <sp:TransportToken>
                            <wsp:Policy>
                                <sp:HttpsToken>
                                    <wsp:Policy>
                                        <wsp:ExactlyOne>
                                            <!-- Require Client Certificate -->
                                            <sp:RequireClientCertificate/>
                                        </wsp:ExactlyOne>
                                    </wsp:Policy>
                                </sp:HttpsToken>
                            </wsp:Policy>
                        </sp:TransportToken>
                        <sp:AlgorithmSuite>
                            <wsp:Policy>
                                <wsp:ExactlyOne>
                                    <sp:Basic256Sha256/>
                                </wsp:ExactlyOne>
                            </wsp:Policy>
                        </sp:AlgorithmSuite>
                    </wsp:Policy>
                </sp:TransportBinding>
            </wsp:All>
        </wsp:ExactlyOne>
    </wsp:Policy>

add the following policy reference inside wsdl:binding section

        <wsp:Policy>
            <wsp:PolicyReference URI="#ClientCertificateBindingPolicy"/>
        </wsp:Policy>

Update target endpoint

For example, if this is the service endpoint to be consumed:

https://api.example.com:50001/v1/users

 find out below string in the WSDL and replace it

https://host:port/

This is how the WSDL looks like after the modification

7. Create Profile

choose Technical Administration —> Profile

create a name, say Client_Cert

select SSL, then choose client certification

activate the profile

8. Create Provider System

choose Technical Administration  -> Provider Systems.

choose 'create special' , then 'create Third Party System'

input a system name and select the profile defined just now

input the username password for the SAP S4HANA system

DO NOT activate the system. Just save it. 

Open the system in change mode

go to tab WSDL Assignment. choose to upload the WSDL modified.

After uploading the WSDL,  you can save and activate the provider system.

Check connection, you should get this view

9. Maintain 'Logon Data'

click create button

fill in a name which does make sense for future reading

choose User/Password or X.509, select the PSE maintained with .pfx file

activate it.

10. Local Configuration

go to Service Administration  --> Local Integration Scenario Configuration

click save button

Fill up a name which does make sense

Under Service Definitions, add the inbound service SalesOrderBulkRequest_In and assign the profile you created earlier.

Next step, As the service group, choose  SDSLS_A2A_SO_NOTIF

With this service group, you add Sales Order (A2A) and Sales Order - Send Processing Notification (A2A).

For the provider IBC reference, choose the provider system that you created earlier.

select the logon data maintain just now in the next step

confirm and activate the configuration

11. Process Tasks

choose Service Administration ->  Pending Tasks

click process task List

if everything has configured correctly , you should get a view similar to this:

 

12. Check the Logical Port generated

goto ‘Web Service Configuration', search for ‘SDSLS_A2A_SO_NOTIF’

there should be logical port generated with a numberic id

in the security tab, it should be similar to this view

in the transport setting tab, you should see the replacing URL modified to WSDL filled in the URL field

Since the logical port is via local configuration or automatically configured, none of the field is editable. This is a big contrast to the manual configuration. 

Conclusion

1. By using OpenSSL, you should be able to generate the .pfx file which uploaded into SAP S4

2. By modifing WSDL, you should be able to generate the client certificate authentication configured in the logical port.

Reference

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/ws-local-configuration..html

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blog-posts-by-members/service-group-configuration-in-soamanager-using-ssl-certificates/ba-p/13572482

entry.title: S/4 HANA How to Get rid of Basic Auth
entry.content:
Basic authentication (Auth) is inherently insecure because it transmits credentials in base64-encoded cleartext with every request, making them vulnerable to interception without HTTPS. It lacks session management, logout functionality, and support for multifactor authentication (MFA), making it vulnerable to replay and brute-force attacks.

Here are Key Disadvantages of Basic Auth:

  • Credential Exposure: Username and password are sent in every request. If not using HTTPS, these are trivially captured and decoded, as Base64 is encoding, not encryption.
  • Replay Attacks: Because credentials are sent repeatedly, a captured header allows an attacker to replay the request and gain access until the password changes.
  • Lack of Session Control: There is no native logout or session expiration mechanism. Once credentials are leaked, they remain valid indefinitely until the password is changed.
  • Poor Security Controls: Basic Auth often lacks support for modern security features, including rate-limiting, account lockout after failed attempts, and multi-factor authentication (MFA).
  • Poor User Experience: Browsers often cache credentials until closed, making it difficult for users to sign out or switch accounts without closing the browser.

While it is easy to implement for internal tools, its lack of security makes it unsuitable for production environments or systems containing sensitive data, especially when the connection is over internet.

Here is my experience how to get rid of basic auth for S/4HANA in difference connection types, without middleware layer. For Inbound/Outbound IDOC connection without PI/CPI as the middleware, a Jco server should be deployed to derive IDOC into an industry standard format, like XML. This design does support client certificate. However since IDOC + Jco is a bit old communication combination, I am not going to address it in a separated postal. Please refer to the web service on client certificate.

The blog post is more for the integration developer rather than the UI developer.

When S/4 HANA works as a service provider(server)

  • API based on OAuth
  • SOAP Inbound web service on the client certificate

When S/4 HANA works as a service consumer(client)

  • RFC Destination on OAuth2
  • RFC Destination on Client Certificate
  • SOAMANAGER Manual Configuration on Oauth2
  • SOAMANAGER Local Configuration on Client Certificate

entry.title: Partner type US issue in SD partner function determination
entry.content:
Hi team,

We want to use the partner type US in one of our custom partner function. we need to add this partner function to BP which will have SAP USER ID as partner number. but currently we are facing multiple issues while adding partner function with partner type US to partner determination procedure. 

Can you please guide us step by step process which needs to be done for US partner type in determination process.

entry.title: Not able to switch to custom Theme in Fiori launchpad
entry.content: We are facing an issue where the custom logo maintained for the Fiori Launchpad is not reflecting on the UI. Despite configuring the custom logo through the standard theming process, the system continues to display the default SAP logo.

entry.title: Deactive / sell / scrap assets in company codes closed for a long time
entry.content:
We want to delete all assets belong to companies had been sold/closed for a long time. Posting period are all closed for these companies. We tried tcodes ABAVN ABAON F-92 to remove these assets but they tried to create posting and all require company period open. Asset cannot be deleted once transaction exists either. Is there a way to scrap or delete them without any new posting? We just want to delete them from database so to clear FI_DOCUMNT errors and compress ACDOCA.

I also archived some assets. Even DELETION step is run, assets still in ANLA table. How do we delete these assets without creating any posting?

Thanks, Colin

entry.title: Kitting workflow to support CTO process
entry.content:
The CTO process used in my warehouse has a manual kitting and packaging operation, where the external manufacturing application generates a kit list. The operator looks up the inventory and sends an email to the storage locations to transfer materials to the packaging location. The parts are packed and returned to the location that initiated the request.  I am trying to find a way to implement a system driven process to manage this. I have three constraints that must be adhered to:
CTO process cannot be impacted. Solution must be additive only
Need to govern material flow referencing the order to maintain clarity of process. 
The packing team uses packing instructions in the current outbound parts shipping. The same operation needs to be followed to take advantage of efficiency and packing integrity.
I have reviewed use of Delivery documents without reference, STO between storage locations, sales orders with reservations, production orders.  All options seem to leave a critical gap. If anyone has attempted this with any success using best practices, could you share your approach?

We are using S/4 HANA with stockroom (LE-WM).

I do not want to deploy a partial solution. Any suggestions would be appreciated.

entry.title: How do the Idoc has to be built for the sales rebate coming from scope 1B6 condition contract?
entry.content:
Dear all

After long research on this topic ( sap documentation, books, best practices, note). I found several pieces of answers but all of them seems old and they don't clearly go in the same way. 

How do the Idoc has to be built for the sales rebate coming from the scope item 1B6 condition contract? Do we have to built under NACE with a standard RSNASTED under WR application? What is the program used ? What Idoc to be used ? INVOIC02? Is there a sap roadmap to cover this topic?

Thank you

Ingrid

entry.title: Unable to find SAP S/4HANA System Administration Certification
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am looking for the certification "SAP Certified Technology Consultant - SAP S/4HANA System Administration", but I am unable to find it in the official SAP certification list or training portal.

Could anyone please clarify:

  • Whether this certification is still available or has been renamed?

  • If it has been replaced, what is the current equivalent certification for SAP Basis / S/4HANA System Administration?

    Any guidance or official reference links would be very helpful.

    Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Committed date is past in sto in s4 hana
entry.content:
Committed date is in past for the sto 4902024735 .

we would like to know what changes are required to ensure commit date always is not in past

In ecc 

4916985649- we have commit date Always as today or future date depending on the availability of material.

we would like to have same behavior in s4 hana

entry.title: Flex hours not reading and populating as zero while configuring works schedule
entry.content:
Hi,

Can some help me to resolve this i've configured New work schedule with flex hours with no overtime. 
The tables used are V_T550p, V_T550A,  V_t551A, V_T508A, V_T551C and generated work schedule.

Still i'm facing attched error.

entry.title: Error in Chart of Dep
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

We have created the Chart of Depreciation: 1000 when we are trying to assign COD to company code :1000.

we are getting below issues:

Error -1: “Parallel crcy area (crcy type 30) missing for area 01 ch. of deprec. 1000”

Error -2: “Ledger NL defined in CoCd 1000 is not active in chart of depreciation 1000”

kindly provide the solution and let us know what the root cause of the issues is.

Please find my attachment.

Regards,

entry.title: Unable to generate a customer account statement in a PDF Form
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Greetings of the day!!!

As per SAP suggestion, we are using the report "RFKORD10" to send the customer account statements seperately for the Zero Balance Accounts and the Detailed Accont Statement.
However, when we send the statement, it is sending the statement in an SAP Script Format. Request you to kindly suggest if there is any way to send the statement in a PDF Form which we are currently using it from "T Code F.27"

Please refer to the earlier SAP Case "1394356/2025".

Thanks & Regards,
Sainath Manchala

entry.title: Vendor Details for RE document
entry.content:
Hi Team,

we had fetched FAGLL03H and FBL3N report for some GL and basis on which checking vendor details for those documents.

we had found that for RE document type vendor details is not coming in FAGLL03H and FBL3N both. 

attachment is there for reference for QA server.

Thanks

Monika 

9717721884

entry.title: Fiori - F2901 tile returns 404 error for Component.js
entry.content: Fiori - F2901 tile is not loading, it's returning 404 not found for Component.js file

entry.title: Error message SIPT805 - " Total value is higher than in original invoice"
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I am experiencing a problem when creating a credit note linked to an invoice in SAP SD.

When I try to save/post the document, the system displays an alert stating that the credit note amount exceeds the original invoice amount, and when I save it, no accounting document is generated and the credit note does not appear in VBRK or SIPT_VBRK.

However, upon checking in detail, the amounts appear to be exactly the same as those on the invoice.

Has anyone else experienced a similar issue?

Any suggestions on what else I should check would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks!

entry.title: Down Payment adjustment for Partial delivery/Partial invoice
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

The customer is on SAP S/4 HANA On Premise solution- SAP S/4 HANA 2023-FPS 1

We have implemented Scope item BKJ- Sales order processing with Customer Down Payment. Now the requirement is to have the down payment adjusted for Partial invoices created against sales order line item. 

Scenario as below.

Order quantity - 100 EA. Delivery to be split on multiple delivery dates on the sales order.

Price per unit - 50 USD/ EA

Total order value - 5000 USD

Advance received - 500 USD (10% of order value)

Partial delivery/ invoice of 10 EA should adjust this 10% advance at the invoice and show an outstanding of only 450 USD against the total invoice value of 500 USD

Is there any Standard SAP solution for the On premise version 2023? 

I know that we can make use of the combination of Service material and condition type to provide a custom solution for this requirement but as far as possible we would want to avoid that.

Any help or pointers would be apprciated.

Thanks in advance.

Kartik Shah

entry.title: Is there a quick way to fill the amount field with remaining balance in app F1520 AR/AP Items tab?
entry.content:
Hi,

Find from note 3421357 - F1069 - Enable double click to autofill amount

'You would like a quick way to fill the amount field with remaining balance in posting/clearing Fiori apps in tabs 'Post on Account' and 'Post to G/L Account'.  With this note, it will be possible to autofill the amount by double clicking the amount field.'

Is there a solution to enable double click to autofill amount in AR/AP Items tab, like the function in Tcode F-28?

Thanks!

Lena

entry.title: The Orders with Item Level Delivery Block are not reflecting in credit exposure.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are facing an issue where the sales order with Delivery Block at item Level is not reflecting in credit exposure of the customer even though it is credit approved.

We have a requirement from business that when a sales order is credit approved ,no matter the Delivery Block at Item Level ,it should reflect the entire amount of the sales order in credit exposure. Can this functionality be achieved by customizing in standard SAP?

If this can not be achieved by standard customizing , is there any other way this can be implemented? 

Thank You 

Simran

entry.title: only active database instances are loaded into system memory
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Please ensure only active database instances are loaded into system memory,with a view to optimising RAM utilisation and reducing infrastructure cost .

 

Regards,

Amit
